payload.answer: Recall returned mem_new because it is the active memory attached to Sam for the Goldman-related fact. mem_old was filtered because it has been superseded by mem_new. Brain preserves historical traceability but does not present superseded memories as current results.
payload.decision: Recall selected mem_new as the current memory for Sam at Goldman and filtered mem_old because mem_old is marked superseded by mem_new, so it is not presented as current.

entity_resolution.reason: Recall matched the query entity Sam and evaluated candidate memories linked to Sam. Among those candidates, mem_new remained active/current while mem_old was excluded due to supersession.

memory_cards.statement: An older memory about Sam from Goldman exists but is not current.

details: Applied supersession filter: mem_old excluded because superseded by mem_new.
Returned only the current memory as recall output.

repair_options: Verify that mem_old has an explicit superseded_by link to mem_new.
If mem_old should still be recallable for audit/debug, expose it only in history/debug views, not as a current fact.
If the supersession was incorrect, remove or amend the supersession edge and reindex recall ranking.
